body.title: Remove SQLite fallback entirely — db_proxy, cortex init branches, IGOR_DB_PATH
body.proposal: Igor wants to edit wild_igor/igor/brainstem/core_patterns.py (HIGH inertia). Plan: . Reason: HIGH inertia write requires human approval: wild_igor/igor/brainstem/core_patterns.py
body.description:
Remove SQLite code paths entirely per 'no SQLite anywhere' rule. Kill: make_home_proxy() SQLite branch (db_proxy.py:841-848), `DatabaseProxy` class (db_proxy.py:134+), SQLite branches in cortex._init_db() (lines 959-1230), IGOR_DB_PATH env var handling. Update Cortex class docstring ('SQLite-backed memory graph' at line 843) to reflect Postgres reality. Closes pass-2 audit Gap 1 (severity high). Pre-approved by Akien 2026-04-22 for HIGH-inertia touches on db_proxy.py + cortex.py — reason: audit finding + kill-SQLite rule enforcement.

**Affected files:** lab/utility_closet/db_proxy.py (remove DatabaseProxy class + SQLite branch in make_home_proxy + update top-of-file docstring), wild_igor/igor/memory/cortex.py (remove SQLite branch 959-1230 + update class docstring at line 843), wild_igor/igor/paths.py (IGOR_DB_PATH handling), any remaining IGOR_DB_PATH references across codebase (discovery).
**Design rules:** no-sqlite: IS the rule enforcement — this is the removal. oop-first: no new shared state. docs-in-code: Cortex class docstring + db_proxy.py top-of-file docstring both updated. test-plan-or-why-not: applies.
**Scope boundary:** IN — remove SQLite code paths + docstring updates + IGOR_DB_PATH env removal. OUT — renaming PGDatabaseProxy, new DB abstractions, broader proxy refactor.
**Gate:** T-test-postgres-schema must ship first.
**Test plan:** Full test suite passes post-removal (all tests → Postgres via T-test-postgres-schema). Grep-assert no `sqlite3` imports, no `DatabaseProxy(` instantiations remain. Manual Igor boot + smoke (`hello`) confirms no regression.
